source_pr.title: plan: forbid limit to push across selection.
source_pr.body:
When the SQL is `Select * from t left join s on true where least(1,2,3,t1.a,t2.b) > 0 order by t2.a limit 10`, the old plan is `Join(t,s)->TopN->Selection`, it's wrong. After fixing it, the plan is `Join(t,s)->Selection->TopN`.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select * from t t1 left outer join t t2 on true where least(1,2,3,t1.a,t2.b) > 0 order by t2.a limit 10", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t t1 left outer join t t2 on true where least(1,2,3,t1.a,t2.b) > 0 order by t2.a limit 10", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t t1 left outer join t t2 on true where least(1,2,3,t1.a,t2.b) > 0 order by t2.a limit 10", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
